CustomField.description: Calculated when the service file is updated. If "Yes" the applicant makes more than the min income limit for this home. If eligible with a waiver, it will say "Yes (Waiver)".
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Calculated when the service file is updated. If "Yes" the applicant makes more than the min income limit for this home. If eligible with a waiver, it will say "Yes (Waiver)".
CustomField.label: Meets Min Income Limit?
